_publications._publicationTitle: Nilotinib is more potent than imatinib for treating plexiform neurofibroma in vitro and in vivo.

_contextSnippet: The decrease in xenograft size was significantly more profound in the nilotinib group than in the untreated group (68 ±7 % vs. 33 ±8 %, P<0.05) and than in the imatinib group (47 ±15 %, P<0.05
resourceName: athymic nude mice (female, nu/nu Balb/c, 6 weeks, 20 g)
details: Xenograft size reduction was significantly more profound in nilotinib group (68±7%) compared to untreated group (33±8%, P<0.05) and imatinib group (47±15%, P<0.05)
